capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise track mobile content as part of the content management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether mobile content is tracked by the content management service

questions.prompt: Is the content management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the service is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for content management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether content management KPIs and KRIs are documented
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for content management

questions.prompt: Are content management KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs are reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or KRIs track MDM coverage and content policy compliance across mobile devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether MDM coverage and policy compliance metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: MDM coverage and policy compliance metrics

questions.prompt: Does the organization measure content distribution success and failure rates for enterprise-managed mobile content?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether content distribution metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: Content distribution success and failure metrics

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized, documented enterprise-wide policy for content management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise-wide content management policy exists

questions.prompt: Is the content management policy reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the policy is reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have MDM or equivalent capability to monitor and manage downloadable content on mobiles at enterprise level?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether downloadable content is monitored and managed enterprise-wide
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise downloadable content monitoring and management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have MDM or equivalent capability to distribute approved content to mobiles at enterprise level?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether content distribution is supported enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have software or MDM capable of managing virtual workspaces on corporate-owned personal mobiles?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether virtual workspace management is supported on mobile devices
questions.evaluation_focus: Virtual workspace management on corporate-owned personal mobiles

questions.prompt: Is provisioning of virtual workspaces on mobile phones automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether virtual space provisioning is automated

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have software or MDM capable of upgrading mobile device firmware remotely?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether remote mobile firmware upgrades are supported

questions.prompt: Can the enterprise automatically trigger mobile firmware upgrades?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether mobile upgrade triggers are automated

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for maintaining golden images for assets, especially endpoints?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a golden image maintenance process exists

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy golden-image-based assets enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether golden images are deployed enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Are assets deployed with golden images automatically during provisioning?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether golden image provisioning is automated

questions.prompt: Are golden images reviewed at least quarterly to enhance the security posture of the image itself?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether golden images are reviewed on a regular cadence
